post.description:
Generate an agent description through agentic discovery.

This endpoint probes the agent to discover its tone, features, goals,
and constraints, then formats the findings into a human-readable description.

post.summary: Export Selected Dataset Chat Test Cases
Search Dataset Test Cases By Filters
Search Simple Dataset Test Cases By Filters
Get Dataset Test Cases Selection Summary
Get Dataset Test Case Navigation Info

post.description:
Generate scenario-based test cases for a dataset.

Creates new dataset if dataset_id is None, otherwise appends to existing.
Project is derived from the agent's project_id.

422.description: The selected dataset doesn't contain any conversations.

patch.description:
Update the visibility of an evaluation result.

Can hide/unhide the result and optionally set the linked test case to draft.

get.description: Export evaluation results in specified format
Export evaluation chat test case snapshots as a dataset JSON file (attachment).

post.description: Search evaluation results with filtering, pagination and sorting.

post.summary: Search Simple Evaluation Results By Filters
post.description: Return simplified evaluation results with ID and test_case_exists flag.

post.summary: Get Evaluation Result Navigation Info By Filters

Get Knowledge Base Document Navigation Info By Filters

get.description: Export a scan result as a JSON file (attachment).
List all scenarios for a project.

post.description:
Generate a preview conversation for a scenario without persisting it.

Uses the same ScenarioBasedGenerator as the final dataset generation,
then calls the specified agent to get a response.

parameters.name: agent_id

schema.description: Agent ID to use for preview
schema.title: Agent Id

parameters.description: Agent ID to use for preview

get.description:
List all evaluation runs triggered by a schedule for a project, grouped by scheduled evaluation.

Kept for compatibility with the existing dashboard data needs.

parameters.name: last_days

schema.description: If provided, only include evaluation runs created in the last N days.
schema.title: Last Days

parameters.description: If provided, only include evaluation runs created in the last N days.

chat_test_case_ids.title: Chat Test Case Ids
chat_test_case_ids.description: IDs of chat test cases to be moved or copied

duplicate.title: Duplicate
duplicate.description: If true, copy chat test cases to the target dataset. If false, move them to the target dataset.

BulkMoveChatTestCasesRequest.title: BulkMoveChatTestCasesRequest
BulkMoveChatTestCasesRequest.description: Request payload for bulk moving or copying chat test cases between datasets.

source_evaluation.description: Optional reference to the evaluation result that created this task (for fix_chat_test_case tasks)

assertions.title: Assertions
assertions.description: DEPRECATED(check-spec-v1): SDK <4.x reads ``assertions`` from the response.

ComparisonResultAPIResource.title: ComparisonResultAPIResource
ComparisonResultAPIResource.description: A single evaluation result within a comparison row — includes the full chat_test_case.

run_count.title: Run Count
run_count.description:
The number of times to run each test case.
        This is useful to get a more accurate result when the chatbot's generation is not deterministic.
        Testing stops at the first failure. If all runs pass, the test case is considered successful.

CreatePlaygroundChat.title: CreatePlaygroundChat
CreatePlaygroundChat.description:
Data to create a playground chat.

Does not contain the user_id since this is determined by the current user.

run_count.title: Run Count
run_count.description:
The number of times to run each test case.
        This is useful to get a more accurate result when the chatbot's generation is not deterministic.
        Testing stops at the first failure. If all runs pass, the test case is considered successful.

disable_test.title: Disable Test
disable_test.description: If true, sets the linked test case to draft status. This only applies when a dataset_test_case_id is provided.

hide_result.title: Hide Result
hide_result.description: If true and linked to an evaluation result, hides that result.

ids.title: Ids
ids.description: IDs of chat test cases to export

ExportChatTestCasesRequest.title: ExportChatTestCasesRequest
ExportChatTestCasesRequest.description: Request payload for exporting a subset of chat test cases from a dataset.

FlatCheckSpec.title: FlatCheckSpec
FlatCheckSpec.description:
A flat check dict as sent by the conversation editor's test button.

Accepts ``{"identifier": "correctness", "reference": "..."}`` and converts
to a proper ``TestCaseCheckConfig``.  Also handles legacy ``type`` key.

n_examples.title: N Examples

KnowledgeBaseDocumentDetailAPIResource.description: Detail shape for KB documents (full content, no embeddings).

KnowledgeBaseDocumentRowAPIResource.title: KnowledgeBaseDocumentRowAPIResource
KnowledgeBaseDocumentRowAPIResource.description: Row shape for server-driven KB documents table (no embeddings).

SearchSelectionSummaryDatasetTestCasesAP.title: SearchSelectionSummaryDatasetTestCasesAPIRequest
SearchSelectionSummaryDatasetTestCasesAP.description:
Request payload for computing a selection summary on dataset test cases.

- When `ids` is provided, the summary is restricted to those test case IDs.
- Filters/search/order_by are still accepted and will further restrict the selection.

SimpleTestCaseAPIResource.description: Minimal row shape for server-side bulk operations.
